info.name: Bongo Bazar Server API
info.description: Complete API collection for Bongo Bazar E-Commerce Server

request.description:
Register a new customer account

🔓 OPEN ROUTE - No authentication required

📋 REQUEST BODY:
- email: String (required) - Valid email address (must be unique)
- password: String (required) - Minimum 6 characters
- name: String (required) - Customer full name
- phone: String (required) - Contact phone number

✅ SUCCESS RESPONSE (201):
- User ID
- Email
- Name
- Phone
- Role: USER
- Status: ACTIVE
- isVerified: false
- createdAt: Timestamp
- accessToken (in response)
- refreshToken (in HTTP-only cookie)

⚠️ VALIDATION RULES:
- Email must be valid format (xxx@xxx.xxx)
- Email must be unique (not already registered)
- Password minimum 6 characters
- All fields required

❌ ERROR RESPONSES:
- 400: Missing required fields or validation error
- 409: Email already registered

🎯 AUTO ASSIGNED:
- Role: USER (always for new customers)
- Status: ACTIVE
- isVerified: false
- needPasswordChange: false

Login with registered customer account

📋 REQUEST BODY:
- email: String (required) - Registered email
- password: String (required) - Account password

✅ SUCCESS RESPONSE (200):
- accessToken
- refreshToken (in HTTP-only cookie)
- needPasswordChange: boolean

❌ ERROR RESPONSES:
- 400: Invalid credentials
- 404: User not found

🔐 RATE LIMITED: Yes (authLimiter applied)
Requires refreshToken cookie
Admin/Super Admin only
Admin/Super Admin only
Admin/Super Admin only

formdata.value: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life

request.description:
Create a new product with image upload

🔐 REQUIRES AUTHENTICATION + VENDOR ROLE

📋 FORM DATA FIELDS:
- name: String (required) - Product name
- slug: String (required) - URL-friendly identifier (must be unique)
- description: String (optional) - Product description
- price: Number (required) - Current selling price
- oldPrice: Number (optional) - Original price for showing discount
- discount: Number (optional) - Discount percentage
- image: File (required) - Primary product image (jpg/png, max 5MB)
- stock: Number (optional) - Available quantity (defaults to 0)
- sku: String (optional) - Stock keeping unit identifier
- isFeatured: Boolean (optional) - Mark as featured product (defaults to false)
- isPublished: Boolean (optional) - Publish status (defaults to true)

📁 FILE UPLOAD:
- Field name 'image' uploads as primary image (URL stored in 'image' field)
- Files are uploaded to Cloudinary
- Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP
- Maximum file size: 5MB

✅ SUCCESS RESPONSE (201):
{
  "id": 123,
  "name": "Premium Wireless Headphones",
  "slug": "premium-wireless-headphones",
  "price": 5999,
  "oldPrice": 8999,
  "discount": 33,
  "image": "https://res.cloudinary.com/...",
  "stock": 50,
  "sku": "WH-XB900N",
  "vendorId": {vendor_user_id},
  "createdAt": "2026-03-13T...",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-13T..."
}

❌ ERROR RESPONSES:
- 400: Missing required fields or validation error
- 401: Unauthorized - authentication required
- 403: Forbidden - vendor role required
- 409: Conflict - slug already exists

📝 NOTES:
- Vendor ID is automatically set from authenticated user
- To upload multiple images, use a separate "Add Product Images" endpoint
- Product ratings start at 0 and update as customers leave reviews

formdata.value: High-performance gaming laptop with RTX 4090 and 16GB RAM

request.description:
Create product with primary image and multiple additional images

📁 FILE HANDLING:
- 'image' field: Primary product image (shows in listings)
- 'images' fields: Additional product images (gallery)
- Each file field can be repeated to upload multiple files
- All files remain optional but recommended for better presentation

💡 TIP: In Postman, to add multiple image fields:
1. Right-click on 'images' field
2. Select 'Add' to duplicate the field
3. Click 'Select Files' and choose additional images

✅ RESPONSE includes both 'image' and 'images' array with Cloudinary URLs
Vendor or Admin
Admin/Super Admin only
Admin only
Admin only
Admin only

Get paginated list of all vendors

Query Parameters:
- page: Page number (default: 1)
- limit: Items per page (default: 10)

Returns vendor info with user details and product count

Get detailed vendor information by vendor ID

Path Parameters:
- id: Vendor ID

Returns vendor details with user info and all products

query.description: Search query (shop name or vendor name)

request.description:
Search vendors by shop name or vendor name

Query Parameters:
- q: Search query (required)
- page: Page number (default: 1)
- limit: Items per page (default: 10)

Case-insensitive search returns matching vendors

Get paginated list of products from a specific vendor

Path Parameters:
- id: Vendor ID

Query Parameters:
- page: Page number (default: 1)
- limit: Items per page (default: 10)

Returns products with categories and ratings

Get vendor business statistics

Path Parameters:
- id: Vendor ID

Returns:
- totalProducts: Number of products listed
- totalOrders: Total number of orders
- totalRevenue: Total revenue generated
- avgRating: Average product rating

Create a new vendor account for authenticated user

Authentication: Required (USER or VENDOR role)

Request Body:
- shopName: String (required) - Name of the shop

Returns created vendor with user details

Get current authenticated vendor's profile

Authentication: Required (VENDOR role)

Returns:
- Vendor details
- User information
- All vendor products with categories

Update vendor profile information

Authentication: Required (VENDOR or ADMIN role)

Path Parameters:
- id: Vendor ID

Request Body:
- shopName: String (required) - Updated shop name

Returns updated vendor details

Delete/deactivate a vendor account

Authentication: Required (ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role)

Path Parameters:
- id: Vendor ID

Note: Performs soft delete - deactivates user account instead of removing data

Get paginated list of all categories

🔐 REQUIRES AUTHENTICATION: Vendor, Admin, or User

📋 QUERY PARAMETERS:
- page: Page number (default: 1)
- limit: Items per page (default: 10)
- sortBy: Field to sort by (default: 'id')
- sortOrder: 'asc' or 'desc' (default: 'asc')

✅ SUCCESS RESPONSE (200):
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "success": true,
  "message": "Categories retrieved successfully!",
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 5
  },
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Electronics",
      "slug": "electronics",
      "products": [...]
    }
  ]
}

Create a new product category

🔐 REQUIRES AUTHENTICATION: Admin only

📋 REQUEST BODY:
- name: String (required) - Category name (max 255 characters)
- slug: String (required) - URL-friendly identifier, must be unique (max 255 characters)

✅ SUCCESS RESPONSE (201):
{
  "statusCode": 201,
  "success": true,
  "message": "Category created successfully!",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Electronics",
    "slug": "electronics"
  }
}

⚠️ VALIDATION RULES:
- name: Required, string, max 255 characters
- slug: Required, string, max 255 characters, must be unique

❌ ERROR RESPONSES:
- 400: Missing required fields or slug already exists
- 401: Unauthorized - authentication required
- 403: Forbidden - admin access required

Update category information

🔐 REQUIRES AUTHENTICATION: Admin only

📋 PATH PARAMETERS:
- id: Category ID (required)

📋 REQUEST BODY (all optional):
- name: String - Updated category name (max 255 characters)
- slug: String - Updated slug (must be unique if provided)

✅ SUCCESS RESPONSE (200):
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "success": true,
  "message": "Category updated successfully!",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Updated Electronics",
    "slug": "updated-electronics"
  }
}

❌ ERROR RESPONSES:
- 404: Category not found
- 400: Slug already exists
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden - admin access required

Delete a product category

🔐 REQUIRES AUTHENTICATION: Admin only

📋 PATH PARAMETERS:
- id: Category ID (required)

⚠️ RESTRICTIONS:
- Cannot delete categories that have associated products
- Check products linked to the category before deletion

✅ SUCCESS RESPONSE (200):
{
  "statusCode": 200,
  "success": true,
  "message": "Category deleted successfully!",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Electronics",
    "slug": "electronics"
  }
}

❌ ERROR RESPONSES:
- 404: Category not found
- 400: Cannot delete category with associated products
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden - admin access required
